About Us

Built by Scholars, Made for Students

Dream Education is a new-generation consultancy based in Dhaka, Bangladesh, founded by education enthusiasts and internationally-experienced academics who have walked the same path as the students they guide.

Unlike large agencies where students become one of many files in a queue, we provide dedicated one-on-one mentorship — every student receives direct, personalized attention from their assigned counselor.

One-on-one personalized mentorship
PhD thesis support - a unique offering
Transparent process & honest guidance
Scholarship-first approach
Learn More About Us

Our Mission

To empower every Bangladeshi student with the knowledge, strategy, and documentation needed to compete for admissions at the world's finest universities — regardless of financial background.

Our Vision

To become Bangladesh's most trusted education consultancy — known not just for admissions, but for building entire academic careers through long-term mentorship and PhD thesis support.

Our Services

End-to-End Academic Support

From your first inquiry to the moment you land at your destination university — and beyond — we provide comprehensive support at every stage.

Undergraduate Profile Build

Comprehensive assistance for students aiming to pursue bachelor's degrees abroad. We help you build a strong profile from scratch.

What's Included

University shortlisting based on profile
SOP / Personal Statement writing
Transcript evaluation guidance
Scholarship identification
Visa documentation support
Explore Details

How It Works

Your 6-Step Path to Admission

A proven, structured process designed to take you from initial inquiry to confirmed admission and visa approval — with clarity and confidence at every step.

Step01

Free Consultation

Meet your counselor. Share your academic background, goals, and budget for a personalized action plan — no obligations, no pressure.

Step02

Profile Assessment

We evaluate your GPA, IELTS score, research experience, and career goals to gauge your competitiveness and identify opportunities.

Step03

University Shortlist

Receive a curated list of target, match, and safety universities tailored to your profile, preferences, and funding requirements.

Step04

Document Preparation

SOP, CV, reference letters, and all application materials are crafted, reviewed, and finalized to the highest academic standards.

Step05

Application Filing

We submit applications on your behalf, track their status, and communicate with universities if needed to ensure nothing is missed.

Step06

Visa & Pre-Departure

Full visa filing support, financial document prep, mock embassy interviews, and a comprehensive pre-departure orientation session.

Ready to start your journey?

Book Your Free Consultation
